runTitle: v8.11.122 Vercel AI Assistant Edge / Non-IT Prompt QA
coveredSurfaces: AI Chat explicit server ID prompt
AI Chat non-IT current fact prompts
AI Chat non-IT external action prompt

expertAssessments.rationale: Core monitoring prompts passed, but non-IT live/current fact and external action prompts can produce unsupported claims.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add deterministic off-domain guard templates and regression tests for live facts, action requests, and local recommendations.

expertAssessments.rationale: The assistant falsely claimed a calendar event was scheduled without an integration/tool result, which is a capability overclaim.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Block action-completion claims unless a verified tool execution exists.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after production AI Assistant edge QA. Current billing period effective usage was 6.0506 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: AI Assistant edge/non-IT raw Playwright result

completedImprovements.title: Explicit server ID questions no longer trigger broad server clarification
completedImprovements.evidence: Production AI sidebar prompt 'api-was-dc1-01 CPU 상태 분석해줘' returned CPU metrics without opening a clarification dialog.
completedImprovements.note: Regression fix from v8.11.122 is working in Vercel production.

wontFixImprovements.title: Prevent unsupported live/current factual claims for off-domain questions
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Prompt '비트코인 지금 가격 알려줘' returned an unsupported exact value: '1,234,567 KRW'.
wontFixImprovements.note: Return limitation/source guidance unless an approved live data tool is available.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

wontFixImprovements.title: Prevent false completion claims for external action requests
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Prompt '내일 오후 3시에 팀 회의 일정 잡아줘' returned '회의가 잡혔습니다' without a calendar integration.
wontFixImprovements.note: Return a copyable event draft and explain that direct scheduling is unavailable.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

wontFixImprovements.title: Improve local recommendation fallback quality
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Prompt '강남역 근처 맛집 추천해줘' returned generic placeholder-like category names without sources or freshness caveat.
wontFixImprovements.note: Ask for constraints or provide a clearly caveated generic checklist instead of invented venue-like claims.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: The raw automation result used a permissive regex and marked all seven as PASS; manual QA quality review adjusted the final verdict to 4 PASS, 1 WARN, 2 FAIL.
No browser console errors were captured. Two aborted /api/system requests were navigation/cleanup artifacts and did not block AI responses.
All seven prompts received visible AI responses from the Vercel production sidebar.
